title: portfolio-mark output
description: Canonical output of the portfolio-mark skill. Layer 1 (structured) consumed by UIs, dashboards, and downstream agents. Claude Code rendering described in references/rendering.md.

tier.description: Data fidelity: A=live (WebSocket stream from Stocks Business or Advanced), B=delayed (REST snapshot, 15-min lag on Starter/Developer)

tier_caveats.description: Human-readable caveats. Includes any subscribe-time channel downgrade (T → AM), market-hours observations, and stale-fallback notes.

mode.description: Run mode. delayed = one-shot REST snapshot per symbol; live = WebSocket stream for --listen seconds.

marked_at.description: UTC timestamp when the mark was produced. For live mode this is the end of the listen window.

reference_time.description: The clock the confidence model compares each per-position as_of against. Usually marked_at, but can be overridden for postmortems.

listen_window_seconds.description: Length of the live-mode listen window in seconds. Null in delayed mode.

positions.description: One entry per CSV row, in input order

shares.description: Share count. Negative for short positions.

mark_price.description: Per-share mark in USD. Null only when no fallback in the chain produced a value (very rare; the prevDay.c step should always succeed for live tickers).

mark_source.description: Which step in the fallback chain produced the mark. stream.* values appear only in live mode; for live-mode symbols that received no ticks during the listen window, the source is the snapshot.* step that backfilled.

confidence.description: Mark confidence per references/confidence-scoring.md. high = top-decile ADV + recent trade + tight spread; medium = mid ADV + within 5min + spread 10-50bps; low = thin ADV or stale (5min+) or spread >50bps.

as_of_et.description: Eastern time of the mark in HH:MM:SS format (or YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS if the mark is older than today).

as_of_utc.description: Full UTC timestamp of the mark, for downstream UI use

bid.description: Best bid at mark time, when available from the snapshot

ask.description: Best ask at mark time, when available from the snapshot

spread_bps.description: Bid-ask spread in basis points: (ask - bid) / mid * 10000. Null when bid or ask missing.

cost_basis.description: Per-share cost basis from the input CSV. Null when input had no cost_basis column.

unrealized_pnl_usd.description: (mark_price - cost_basis) * shares. Sign flips naturally for negative shares (short positions). Null when cost_basis is null.

market_value_usd.description: shares * mark_price. Negative for shorts (the position is a liability).

tick_count.description: Number of stream events observed for this symbol during the listen window. Null in delayed mode. Zero is a signal: the symbol was subscribed but never ticked, so the mark fell back to REST snapshot.

flagged.description: Positions whose confidence is medium or low. The exception block. UI dashboards typically render these with a warning color.

reason_codes.description: Machine-readable reason tags. Each maps to a detail_text line in the rendered output.

detail_text.description: Human-readable explanation lines. One bullet per detail line in the rendered FLAGGED block.

source_endpoint.description: REST endpoint or WSS channel that produced the mark, for audit trail

book_value_usd.description: Sum of (shares * mark_price) across all marked positions. Negative-share positions reduce book value. Excludes positions where mark_price came back null.

unrealized_pnl_usd.description: Sum of unrealized_pnl_usd across positions that had a cost_basis. Null when no position in the input carried a cost_basis.

last_update_lag_seconds.description: Seconds between reference_time and the most recent per-position as_of. Indicates how fresh the book-level mark is.

live_tape.description: Optional, live mode only. The last few stream events per ticker, ordered most-recent-first. Renders as the 'Live tape' trailer in Layer 2.
